records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? You're someone I've never seen before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? You're someone I've never seen before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? You're someone I've never seen before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who's this old lady?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who's this old lady?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who's this old lady?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...What did you call me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...What did you call me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...What did you call me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! I got a job as soon as I graduated!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! I got a job as soon as I graduated!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! I got a job as soon as I graduated!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if I'm old, you and I are only three or four years apart!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if I'm old, you and I are only three or four years apart!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if I'm old, you and I are only three or four years apart!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, really?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, really?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, really?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Guess you're younger than you look! Sorry! My bad!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Guess you're younger than you look! Sorry! My bad!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Guess you're younger than you look! Sorry! My bad!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You're doing that on purpose, aren't you?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You're doing that on purpose, aren't you?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You're doing that on purpose, aren't you?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who are you? I've never seen you around here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who are you? I've never seen you around here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who are you? I've never seen you around here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? You work in an Administration facility and don't know who I am?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? You work in an Administration facility and don't know who I am?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? You work in an Administration facility and don't know who I am?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do I have to know?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do I have to know?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do I have to know?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha! Behold!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha! Behold!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha! Behold!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am the youngest person the Administration offered to become a division Commander!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am the youngest person the Administration offered to become a division Commander!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am the youngest person the Administration offered to become a division Commander!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But of course, I decided to stay in the Fenrir Division to cherish the memories I have with Master.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But of course, I decided to stay in the Fenrir Division to cherish the memories I have with Master.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But of course, I decided to stay in the Fenrir Division to cherish the memories I have with Master.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, "Commander." I hate that word!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, "Commander." I hate that word!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, "Commander." I hate that word!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that really that big of a deal?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that really that big of a deal?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that really that big of a deal?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, you don't know?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, you don't know?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, you don't know?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Being offered a Commander position by the Administration means
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Being offered a Commander position by the Administration means
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Being offered a Commander position by the Administration means
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sooyeon! Lee Sooyeon!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sooyeon! Lee Sooyeon!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sooyeon! Lee Sooyeon!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sooyeon, I told you to behave yourself because another division is stationed here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sooyeon, I told you to behave yourself because another division is stationed here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sooyeon, I told you to behave yourself because another division is stationed here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What, Beanstalk?! I didn't do anything yet!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What, Beanstalk?! I didn't do anything yet!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What, Beanstalk?! I didn't do anything yet!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, hello. You're the Yaksha Division, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, hello. You're the Yaksha Division, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, hello. You're the Yaksha Division, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Yeah...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Yeah...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Yeah...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Was our Sooyeon being rude to you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Was our Sooyeon being rude to you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Was our Sooyeon being rude to you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, from the looks of it, she already did something.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, from the looks of it, she already did something.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, from the looks of it, she already did something.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you were offended by her, I apologize on her behalf.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you were offended by her, I apologize on her behalf.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you were offended by her, I apologize on her behalf.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...N-no need. Nothing happened.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...N-no need. Nothing happened.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...N-no need. Nothing happened.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm glad to hear that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm glad to hear that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm glad to hear that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, by the way, I'm Na Yubin of the Fenrir Division. And this is Lee Sooyeon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, by the way, I'm Na Yubin of the Fenrir Division. And this is Lee Sooyeon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, by the way, I'm Na Yubin of the Fenrir Division. And this is Lee Sooyeon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If she caused you any trouble, please don't take it to heart.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If she caused you any trouble, please don't take it to heart.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If she caused you any trouble, please don't take it to heart.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Beanstalk! What are you apologizing for?! I said I didn't do anything!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Beanstalk! What are you apologizing for?! I said I didn't do anything!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Beanstalk! What are you apologizing for?! I said I didn't do anything!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was just here to buy some chocolate-covered sunflower seeds! They only sell them here at this Apocalypse Convenience Store!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was just here to buy some chocolate-covered sunflower seeds! They only sell them here at this Apocalypse Convenience Store!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was just here to buy some chocolate-covered sunflower seeds! They only sell them here at this Apocalypse Convenience Store!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay, but let's go. Master's calling.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay, but let's go. Master's calling.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay, but let's go. Master's calling.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Master wants to see me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Master wants to see me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Master wants to see me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Who are those two?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Who are those two?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Who are those two?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Fenrir Division? So even kids like them are fighting C.O.s?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Fenrir Division? So even kids like them are fighting C.O.s?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Fenrir Division? So even kids like them are fighting C.O.s?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What exactly does the Administration even do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What exactly does the Administration even do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What exactly does the Administration even do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh. You're up early.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh. You're up early.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh. You're up early.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Showing so much enthusiasm already? How admirable.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Showing so much enthusiasm already? How admirable.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Showing so much enthusiasm already? How admirable.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't get me wrong. I just don't like being late.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't get me wrong. I just don't like being late.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't get me wrong. I just don't like being late.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You said you would show me how to control CRF starting today, remember?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You said you would show me how to control CRF starting today, remember?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You said you would show me how to control CRF starting today, remember?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu, there's no need to get antsy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu, there's no need to get antsy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu, there's no need to get antsy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I already told you. I'm not the one who's going to teach you about utilizing CRF.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I already told you. I'm not the one who's going to teach you about utilizing CRF.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I already told you. I'm not the one who's going to teach you about utilizing CRF.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We still have time before she arrives, so how about we go over a few things, in the meantime?
records.m_Talk_DEU: We still have time before she arrives, so how about we go over a few things, in the meantime?
records.m_Talk_FRA: We still have time before she arrives, so how about we go over a few things, in the meantime?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Like theory?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Like theory?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Like theory?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, what do you think a Counter is?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, what do you think a Counter is?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, what do you think a Counter is?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You said it yourself. Counters are people who obtain a Watch and gain superpowers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You said it yourself. Counters are people who obtain a Watch and gain superpowers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You said it yourself. Counters are people who obtain a Watch and gain superpowers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, I knew you'd say that. Anything else?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, I knew you'd say that. Anything else?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, I knew you'd say that. Anything else?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know that Counters need to control the Counter Reality Force, CRF, to use their abilities.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know that Counters need to control the Counter Reality Force, CRF, to use their abilities.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know that Counters need to control the Counter Reality Force, CRF, to use their abilities.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you asked me to come here today, so I can learn about it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you asked me to come here today, so I can learn about it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you asked me to come here today, so I can learn about it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You know well. Guess you did your homework, hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You know well. Guess you did your homework, hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You know well. Guess you did your homework, hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay! Pop quiz!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay! Pop quiz!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay! Pop quiz!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are non-Counters not able to use CRF?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are non-Counters not able to use CRF?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are non-Counters not able to use CRF?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you talking about? You need to know how to control CRF to use Counter abilities.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you talking about? You need to know how to control CRF to use Counter abilities.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you talking about? You need to know how to control CRF to use Counter abilities.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So there's no way an ordinary person is able to use superpowers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So there's no way an ordinary person is able to use superpowers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So there's no way an ordinary person is able to use superpowers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: BZZZT! Wrong answer!
records.m_Talk_DEU: BZZZT! Wrong answer!
records.m_Talk_FRA: BZZZT! Wrong answer!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: CRF stands for Counter Reality Force. It means the <color=#ffd34c>power to change reality</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: CRF stands for Counter Reality Force. It means the <color=#ffd34c>power to change reality</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: CRF stands for Counter Reality Force. It means the <color=#ffd34c>power to change reality</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you can say that any being who possesses possibilities, including humans, has CRF.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you can say that any being who possesses possibilities, including humans, has CRF.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you can say that any being who possesses possibilities, including humans, has CRF.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then are you telling me that ordinary people can also have superpowers?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then are you telling me that ordinary people can also have superpowers?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then are you telling me that ordinary people can also have superpowers?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, that's not it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, that's not it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, that's not it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's because ordinary people spend their CRF in increments over their lifetime.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's because ordinary people spend their CRF in increments over their lifetime.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's because ordinary people spend their CRF in increments over their lifetime.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They steadily change their reality little by little through their own will.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They steadily change their reality little by little through their own will.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They steadily change their reality little by little through their own will.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For instance, like you, Alice Braidwood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For instance, like you, Alice Braidwood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For instance, like you, Alice Braidwood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After that fire incident you had when you were little, you've always dreamt of being a firefighter, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: After that fire incident you had when you were little, you've always dreamt of being a firefighter, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: After that fire incident you had when you were little, you've always dreamt of being a firefighter, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you worked hard to achieve that dream, eventually becoming one, didn't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you worked hard to achieve that dream, eventually becoming one, didn't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you worked hard to achieve that dream, eventually becoming one, didn't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: In other words, as a result of consuming CRF in tiny portions, your external reality had changed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In other words, as a result of consuming CRF in tiny portions, your external reality had changed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In other words, as a result of consuming CRF in tiny portions, your external reality had changed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Damn, how did you find out about that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Damn, how did you find out about that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Damn, how did you find out about that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: On the other hand, Counters can use their Watch as a catalyst to use bursts of their CRF at a time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: On the other hand, Counters can use their Watch as a catalyst to use bursts of their CRF at a time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: On the other hand, Counters can use their Watch as a catalyst to use bursts of their CRF at a time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I use myself as an example, like this...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I use myself as an example, like this...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I use myself as an example, like this...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just by imagining an image, I can create an ice carrot by freezing the moisture in the air.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just by imagining an image, I can create an ice carrot by freezing the moisture in the air.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just by imagining an image, I can create an ice carrot by freezing the moisture in the air.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, if Counters learn how to use CRF, they can make anything out of their imagination?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, if Counters learn how to use CRF, they can make anything out of their imagination?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, if Counters learn how to use CRF, they can make anything out of their imagination?

records.m_Talk_ENG: In theory, yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In theory, yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In theory, yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But everyone has a different capacity for CRF...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But everyone has a different capacity for CRF...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But everyone has a different capacity for CRF...

records.m_Talk_ENG: and the human mind is narrower than you think.
records.m_Talk_DEU: and the human mind is narrower than you think.
records.m_Talk_FRA: and the human mind is narrower than you think.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because even if you're a Counter, you can't be free from common sense, stereotypes, and experience.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because even if you're a Counter, you can't be free from common sense, stereotypes, and experience.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because even if you're a Counter, you can't be free from common sense, stereotypes, and experience.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, Counter Reality Force is... <color=#ffd34c>potent</color>, but it's not <color=#ffd34c>omnipotent</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, Counter Reality Force is... <color=#ffd34c>potent</color>, but it's not <color=#ffd34c>omnipotent</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, Counter Reality Force is... <color=#ffd34c>potent</color>, but it's not <color=#ffd34c>omnipotent</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The more I think about it, nothing drastically changed other than my getting cat ears and tail.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The more I think about it, nothing drastically changed other than my getting cat ears and tail.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The more I think about it, nothing drastically changed other than my getting cat ears and tail.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And unless it was something urgent, I couldn't exert much power.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And unless it was something urgent, I couldn't exert much power.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And unless it was something urgent, I couldn't exert much power.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So according to you... this is all because I'm narrow-minded?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So according to you... this is all because I'm narrow-minded?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So according to you... this is all because I'm narrow-minded?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu, but that's not your fault.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu, but that's not your fault.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu, but that's not your fault.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In order to prevent mass panic, the Administration has been actively covering up the existence of Counters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In order to prevent mass panic, the Administration has been actively covering up the existence of Counters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In order to prevent mass panic, the Administration has been actively covering up the existence of Counters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In today's era, there are people who live ordinary lives without realizing they're Counters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In today's era, there are people who live ordinary lives without realizing they're Counters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In today's era, there are people who live ordinary lives without realizing they're Counters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, even if they don't know how to control their CRF...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, even if they don't know how to control their CRF...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, even if they don't know how to control their CRF...

records.m_Talk_ENG: they'll still show exceptional talent in their respective fields since they are still technically Counters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: they'll still show exceptional talent in their respective fields since they are still technically Counters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: they'll still show exceptional talent in their respective fields since they are still technically Counters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You know how they say geniuses are short-lived, right? Perhaps among them, some were Counters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You know how they say geniuses are short-lived, right? Perhaps among them, some were Counters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You know how they say geniuses are short-lived, right? Perhaps among them, some were Counters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then what do I have to do to get a grasp on CRF?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then what do I have to do to get a grasp on CRF?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then what do I have to do to get a grasp on CRF?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're not going to tell me to do image training or shadow-boxing, are you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're not going to tell me to do image training or shadow-boxing, are you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're not going to tell me to do image training or shadow-boxing, are you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those do help a little, but what comes first is to change your own consciousness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those do help a little, but what comes first is to change your own consciousness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those do help a little, but what comes first is to change your own consciousness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Change my consciousness?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Change my consciousness?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Change my consciousness?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You shouldn't just simply accept the fact that Counters have <color=#ffd34c>superpowers</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You shouldn't just simply accept the fact that Counters have <color=#ffd34c>superpowers</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You shouldn't just simply accept the fact that Counters have <color=#ffd34c>superpowers</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Instead, you should directly meet with a powerful Counter, and experience their power up close.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Instead, you should directly meet with a powerful Counter, and experience their power up close.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Instead, you should directly meet with a powerful Counter, and experience their power up close.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Theoretically, such processes have an effect on one's consciousness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Theoretically, such processes have an effect on one's consciousness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Theoretically, such processes have an effect on one's consciousness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it's only theoretical.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it's only theoretical.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it's only theoretical.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Meet with a Counter? But aren't you a Counter?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Meet with a Counter? But aren't you a Counter?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Meet with a Counter? But aren't you a Counter?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu, I'm flattered you think so highly of me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu, I'm flattered you think so highly of me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu, I'm flattered you think so highly of me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But unfortunately, my abilities are a bit unusual, so it's hard for me to show you what a Counter can really do.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But unfortunately, my abilities are a bit unusual, so it's hard for me to show you what a Counter can really do.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But unfortunately, my abilities are a bit unusual, so it's hard for me to show you what a Counter can really do.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why I personally asked <color=#ffd34c>the ace of the Administration</color> to come in today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why I personally asked <color=#ffd34c>the ace of the Administration</color> to come in today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why I personally asked <color=#ffd34c>the ace of the Administration</color> to come in today.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The ace of the Administration...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The ace of the Administration...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The ace of the Administration...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, I think she's here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, I think she's here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, I think she's here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?! It's that firefighter lady!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?! It's that firefighter lady!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?! It's that firefighter lady!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who are you? I've never seen you around here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who are you? I've never seen you around here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who are you? I've never seen you around here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? You work in an Administration facility and don't know who I am?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? You work in an Administration facility and don't know who I am?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? You work in an Administration facility and don't know who I am?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do I have to know?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do I have to know?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do I have to know?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha! Behold!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha! Behold!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha! Behold!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I am the youngest person the Administration offered to become a division Commander!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I am the youngest person the Administration offered to become a division Commander!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I am the youngest person the Administration offered to become a division Commander!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But of course, I decided to stay in the Fenrir Division to cherish the memories I have with Master.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But of course, I decided to stay in the Fenrir Division to cherish the memories I have with Master.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But of course, I decided to stay in the Fenrir Division to cherish the memories I have with Master.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, "Commander." I hate that word!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, "Commander." I hate that word!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, "Commander." I hate that word!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that really that big of a deal?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is that really that big of a deal?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that really that big of a deal?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, you don't know?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, you don't know?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, you don't know?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Being offered a Commander position by the Administration means
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Being offered a Commander position by the Administration means
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Being offered a Commander position by the Administration means
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sooyeon! Lee Sooyeon!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sooyeon! Lee Sooyeon!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sooyeon! Lee Sooyeon!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sooyeon, I told you to behave yourself because another division is stationed here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sooyeon, I told you to behave yourself because another division is stationed here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sooyeon, I told you to behave yourself because another division is stationed here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What, Beanstalk?! I didn't do anything yet!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What, Beanstalk?! I didn't do anything yet!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What, Beanstalk?! I didn't do anything yet!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, hello. You're the Yaksha Division, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, hello. You're the Yaksha Division, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, hello. You're the Yaksha Division, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Yeah...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Yeah...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Yeah...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Was our Sooyeon being rude to you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Was our Sooyeon being rude to you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Was our Sooyeon being rude to you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, from the looks of it, she already did something.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, from the looks of it, she already did something.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, from the looks of it, she already did something.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you were offended by her, I apologize on her behalf.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you were offended by her, I apologize on her behalf.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you were offended by her, I apologize on her behalf.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...N-no need. Nothing happened.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...N-no need. Nothing happened.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...N-no need. Nothing happened.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm glad to hear that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm glad to hear that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm glad to hear that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, by the way, I'm Na Yubin of the Fenrir Division. And this is Lee Sooyeon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, by the way, I'm Na Yubin of the Fenrir Division. And this is Lee Sooyeon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, by the way, I'm Na Yubin of the Fenrir Division. And this is Lee Sooyeon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If she caused you any trouble, please don't take it to heart.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If she caused you any trouble, please don't take it to heart.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If she caused you any trouble, please don't take it to heart.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Beanstalk! What are you apologizing for?! I said I didn't do anything!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Beanstalk! What are you apologizing for?! I said I didn't do anything!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Beanstalk! What are you apologizing for?! I said I didn't do anything!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I was just here to buy some chocolate-covered sunflower seeds! They only sell them here at this Apocalypse Convenience Store!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I was just here to buy some chocolate-covered sunflower seeds! They only sell them here at this Apocalypse Convenience Store!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I was just here to buy some chocolate-covered sunflower seeds! They only sell them here at this Apocalypse Convenience Store!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay, but let's go. Master's calling.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay, but let's go. Master's calling.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay, but let's go. Master's calling.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Master wants to see me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Master wants to see me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Master wants to see me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Who are those two?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Who are those two?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Who are those two?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Fenrir Division? So even kids like them are fighting C.O.s?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Fenrir Division? So even kids like them are fighting C.O.s?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Fenrir Division? So even kids like them are fighting C.O.s?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What exactly does the Administration even do?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What exactly does the Administration even do?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What exactly does the Administration even do?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh. You're up early.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh. You're up early.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh. You're up early.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Showing so much enthusiasm already? How admirable.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Showing so much enthusiasm already? How admirable.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Showing so much enthusiasm already? How admirable.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't get me wrong. I just don't like being late.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't get me wrong. I just don't like being late.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't get me wrong. I just don't like being late.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You said you would show me how to control CRF starting today, remember?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You said you would show me how to control CRF starting today, remember?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You said you would show me how to control CRF starting today, remember?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu, there's no need to get antsy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu, there's no need to get antsy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu, there's no need to get antsy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I already told you. I'm not the one who's going to teach you about utilizing CRF.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I already told you. I'm not the one who's going to teach you about utilizing CRF.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I already told you. I'm not the one who's going to teach you about utilizing CRF.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We still have time before she arrives, so how about we go over a few things, in the meantime?
root.m_Talk_DEU: We still have time before she arrives, so how about we go over a few things, in the meantime?
root.m_Talk_FRA: We still have time before she arrives, so how about we go over a few things, in the meantime?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Like theory?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Like theory?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Like theory?

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, what do you think a Counter is?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, what do you think a Counter is?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, what do you think a Counter is?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You said it yourself. Counters are people who obtain a Watch and gain superpowers.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You said it yourself. Counters are people who obtain a Watch and gain superpowers.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You said it yourself. Counters are people who obtain a Watch and gain superpowers.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, I knew you'd say that. Anything else?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, I knew you'd say that. Anything else?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, I knew you'd say that. Anything else?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know that Counters need to control the Counter Reality Force, CRF, to use their abilities.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know that Counters need to control the Counter Reality Force, CRF, to use their abilities.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know that Counters need to control the Counter Reality Force, CRF, to use their abilities.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And you asked me to come here today, so I can learn about it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And you asked me to come here today, so I can learn about it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And you asked me to come here today, so I can learn about it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You know well. Guess you did your homework, hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You know well. Guess you did your homework, hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You know well. Guess you did your homework, hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay! Pop quiz!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay! Pop quiz!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay! Pop quiz!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are non-Counters not able to use CRF?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are non-Counters not able to use CRF?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are non-Counters not able to use CRF?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you talking about? You need to know how to control CRF to use Counter abilities.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you talking about? You need to know how to control CRF to use Counter abilities.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you talking about? You need to know how to control CRF to use Counter abilities.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So there's no way an ordinary person is able to use superpowers.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So there's no way an ordinary person is able to use superpowers.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So there's no way an ordinary person is able to use superpowers.

root.m_Talk_ENG: BZZZT! Wrong answer!
root.m_Talk_DEU: BZZZT! Wrong answer!
root.m_Talk_FRA: BZZZT! Wrong answer!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? What?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? What?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? What?

root.m_Talk_ENG: CRF stands for Counter Reality Force. It means the <color=#ffd34c>power to change reality</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: CRF stands for Counter Reality Force. It means the <color=#ffd34c>power to change reality</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: CRF stands for Counter Reality Force. It means the <color=#ffd34c>power to change reality</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So you can say that any being who possesses possibilities, including humans, has CRF.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So you can say that any being who possesses possibilities, including humans, has CRF.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So you can say that any being who possesses possibilities, including humans, has CRF.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then are you telling me that ordinary people can also have superpowers?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then are you telling me that ordinary people can also have superpowers?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then are you telling me that ordinary people can also have superpowers?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, that's not it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, that's not it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, that's not it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's because ordinary people spend their CRF in increments over their lifetime.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's because ordinary people spend their CRF in increments over their lifetime.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's because ordinary people spend their CRF in increments over their lifetime.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They steadily change their reality little by little through their own will.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They steadily change their reality little by little through their own will.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They steadily change their reality little by little through their own will.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For instance, like you, Alice Braidwood.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For instance, like you, Alice Braidwood.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For instance, like you, Alice Braidwood.

root.m_Talk_ENG: After that fire incident you had when you were little, you've always dreamt of being a firefighter, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: After that fire incident you had when you were little, you've always dreamt of being a firefighter, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: After that fire incident you had when you were little, you've always dreamt of being a firefighter, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: And you worked hard to achieve that dream, eventually becoming one, didn't you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And you worked hard to achieve that dream, eventually becoming one, didn't you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And you worked hard to achieve that dream, eventually becoming one, didn't you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: In other words, as a result of consuming CRF in tiny portions, your external reality had changed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In other words, as a result of consuming CRF in tiny portions, your external reality had changed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In other words, as a result of consuming CRF in tiny portions, your external reality had changed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Damn, how did you find out about that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Damn, how did you find out about that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Damn, how did you find out about that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: On the other hand, Counters can use their Watch as a catalyst to use bursts of their CRF at a time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: On the other hand, Counters can use their Watch as a catalyst to use bursts of their CRF at a time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: On the other hand, Counters can use their Watch as a catalyst to use bursts of their CRF at a time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I use myself as an example, like this...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I use myself as an example, like this...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I use myself as an example, like this...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just by imagining an image, I can create an ice carrot by freezing the moisture in the air.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just by imagining an image, I can create an ice carrot by freezing the moisture in the air.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just by imagining an image, I can create an ice carrot by freezing the moisture in the air.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, if Counters learn how to use CRF, they can make anything out of their imagination?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, if Counters learn how to use CRF, they can make anything out of their imagination?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, if Counters learn how to use CRF, they can make anything out of their imagination?

root.m_Talk_ENG: In theory, yes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In theory, yes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In theory, yes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But everyone has a different capacity for CRF...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But everyone has a different capacity for CRF...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But everyone has a different capacity for CRF...

root.m_Talk_ENG: and the human mind is narrower than you think.
root.m_Talk_DEU: and the human mind is narrower than you think.
root.m_Talk_FRA: and the human mind is narrower than you think.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because even if you're a Counter, you can't be free from common sense, stereotypes, and experience.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because even if you're a Counter, you can't be free from common sense, stereotypes, and experience.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because even if you're a Counter, you can't be free from common sense, stereotypes, and experience.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, Counter Reality Force is... <color=#ffd34c>potent</color>, but it's not <color=#ffd34c>omnipotent</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, Counter Reality Force is... <color=#ffd34c>potent</color>, but it's not <color=#ffd34c>omnipotent</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, Counter Reality Force is... <color=#ffd34c>potent</color>, but it's not <color=#ffd34c>omnipotent</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The more I think about it, nothing drastically changed other than my getting cat ears and tail.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The more I think about it, nothing drastically changed other than my getting cat ears and tail.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The more I think about it, nothing drastically changed other than my getting cat ears and tail.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And unless it was something urgent, I couldn't exert much power.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And unless it was something urgent, I couldn't exert much power.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And unless it was something urgent, I couldn't exert much power.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So according to you... this is all because I'm narrow-minded?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So according to you... this is all because I'm narrow-minded?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So according to you... this is all because I'm narrow-minded?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu, but that's not your fault.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu, but that's not your fault.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu, but that's not your fault.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In order to prevent mass panic, the Administration has been actively covering up the existence of Counters.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In order to prevent mass panic, the Administration has been actively covering up the existence of Counters.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In order to prevent mass panic, the Administration has been actively covering up the existence of Counters.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In today's era, there are people who live ordinary lives without realizing they're Counters.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In today's era, there are people who live ordinary lives without realizing they're Counters.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In today's era, there are people who live ordinary lives without realizing they're Counters.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, even if they don't know how to control their CRF...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, even if they don't know how to control their CRF...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, even if they don't know how to control their CRF...

root.m_Talk_ENG: they'll still show exceptional talent in their respective fields since they are still technically Counters.
root.m_Talk_DEU: they'll still show exceptional talent in their respective fields since they are still technically Counters.
root.m_Talk_FRA: they'll still show exceptional talent in their respective fields since they are still technically Counters.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You know how they say geniuses are short-lived, right? Perhaps among them, some were Counters.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You know how they say geniuses are short-lived, right? Perhaps among them, some were Counters.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You know how they say geniuses are short-lived, right? Perhaps among them, some were Counters.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then what do I have to do to get a grasp on CRF?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then what do I have to do to get a grasp on CRF?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then what do I have to do to get a grasp on CRF?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're not going to tell me to do image training or shadow-boxing, are you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're not going to tell me to do image training or shadow-boxing, are you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're not going to tell me to do image training or shadow-boxing, are you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Those do help a little, but what comes first is to change your own consciousness.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Those do help a little, but what comes first is to change your own consciousness.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Those do help a little, but what comes first is to change your own consciousness.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Change my consciousness?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Change my consciousness?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Change my consciousness?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You shouldn't just simply accept the fact that Counters have <color=#ffd34c>superpowers</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You shouldn't just simply accept the fact that Counters have <color=#ffd34c>superpowers</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You shouldn't just simply accept the fact that Counters have <color=#ffd34c>superpowers</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Instead, you should directly meet with a powerful Counter, and experience their power up close.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Instead, you should directly meet with a powerful Counter, and experience their power up close.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Instead, you should directly meet with a powerful Counter, and experience their power up close.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Theoretically, such processes have an effect on one's consciousness.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Theoretically, such processes have an effect on one's consciousness.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Theoretically, such processes have an effect on one's consciousness.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But it's only theoretical.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But it's only theoretical.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But it's only theoretical.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Meet with a Counter? But aren't you a Counter?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Meet with a Counter? But aren't you a Counter?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Meet with a Counter? But aren't you a Counter?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu, I'm flattered you think so highly of me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu, I'm flattered you think so highly of me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu, I'm flattered you think so highly of me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But unfortunately, my abilities are a bit unusual, so it's hard for me to show you what a Counter can really do.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But unfortunately, my abilities are a bit unusual, so it's hard for me to show you what a Counter can really do.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But unfortunately, my abilities are a bit unusual, so it's hard for me to show you what a Counter can really do.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's why I personally asked <color=#ffd34c>the ace of the Administration</color> to come in today.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's why I personally asked <color=#ffd34c>the ace of the Administration</color> to come in today.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's why I personally asked <color=#ffd34c>the ace of the Administration</color> to come in today.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The ace of the Administration...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The ace of the Administration...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The ace of the Administration...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, I think she's here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, I think she's here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, I think she's here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?! It's that firefighter lady!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?! It's that firefighter lady!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?! It's that firefighter lady!

root.m_Talk_ENG:

8vThat tomboy?
root.m_Talk_DEU:

8vThat tomboy?
root.m_Talk_FRA:

8vThat tomboy?
